parameters: \p2Right, let's rest up. We have another
day of traveling ahead of us!
\p2So, you really don't have an end goal in mind?
Out here wandering the world with no purpose?
Now when you say it like that...
Now when you say it like that...
\p2Right, right, I don't mean to be offensive.
I'm honestly jealous. I'm so sick of the
boring day-to-day grind in the village.
That's the reason I'm finally leaving.
\p2It'll be risky out there, but with my wand
and your blade, we'll be unstoppable!
\p2I'm not kidding when I say it'll be dangerous, though. Remember earlier when I
said it's the perfect time to set out on a journey? Well... not really. It used
to be pretty safe out there, but nowadays, you can barely make it outside the
village without running into monsters. Makes you wonder where they come from...
\p2It's just rumors... I hope. I've heard talk of a
\c[18]demon king\c[0] who is responsible for the
sudden rise in monsters. \c[18]His\c[0] sole purpose for
existing is to destroy the human race.
\p2Yeah, of course... there was a terrible catastrophe
1000 years ago that nearly wiped out the human race.
People are starting to say it was caused by \c[18]Apocalypse\c[0],
or maybe some other reincarnation of \c[18]him\c[0].
be the end of humanity as we know it...
\p2Who even cares if \c[18]Apocalypse\c[0] is real or not!
The truth is, there are people out there who
need our help. If that's not reason enough to
set out on a journey RIGHT NOW, what else is?
\p2Maybe we're just two guys who happen to be walking
the same way. But my visions are greater than that. We
could be heroes! Fame, glory, fortune, all to ourselves!
So whaddya' say? It's too good to pass up!
\p2Come on, it's the adventure of a lifetime, and you know it!
You've set your sights on defeating \c[18]Apocalypse\c[0]!
\p2Tomorrow is the beginning of something incredible:
the start of our journey to defeat \c[18]Apocalypse\c[0]!
Or at least find out if \c[18]he\c[0]'s even real.
\p2I won't keep you up any longer. Let's get
some rest before we set out again.
\-\}WHAT THE HELL DO YOU THINK YOU'RE DOING?!
\p2She probably doesn't want our help, but
it sounds like she could use it...
